name: Tibbles-Rawlings (T-R) minimal medium + D-glucosamine hydrochloride (PMC10942773)
description: Tibbles-Rawlings (T-R) minimal medium + D-glucosamine hydrochloride — medium reported in PMC10942773 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC10942773 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification_evidence: cells were transferred (1% inoculation) into 50 ml of Tibbles–Rawlings (T-R) minimal medium (see Table S3 for a detailed recipe, [33]) that was supplemented with 0.5% (w/v) D-(+)-glucosamine hydrochloride (TCI America, #G0044) as a carbon source
